templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here: https://www.nobullproject.com/pages/the-chipper

templates.name: Do you ship to APO / FPO Addresses?
templates.content:
Yes! Please select United States in the drop down for your Country/region and then select Armed Forces Americas, Armed Forces Europe or Armed Forces Pacific in the State drop down in checkout. Please note APO or FPO in the City field. All APO/FPO orders ship via USPS from the United States. 

Do not include the country or the base camp's city, as it might be routed through the host country's mail system. Here's an example: https://support.nobullproject.com/hc/en-us/articles/115007994168-Do-you-ship-to-APO-FPO-Addresses

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to contact us via this link: https://support.nobullproject.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=539927 Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do you offer international shipping?
templates.content: For international orders, orders will ship using DHL and ePost. Local carriers may be used for final mile delivery. You can take a look at the shipping timeframes here: https://support.nobullproject.com/hc/en-us/articles/115007833367-What-shipping-methods-are-available

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://support.nobullproject.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=539927 Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $99. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.nobullproject.com/pages/order-tracking

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We work hard to get to your order as soon as possible in order to help ensure a speedy delivery. Unfortunately, that means once your order has been placed we are unable to cancel or make any changes. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: What is the birthday gift?
templates.content:
The birthday gift is for VIP and NOBULL Family statuses and is subject to change annually. You will receive an email on your birthday with a unique code that you must enter into the 'Gift card or discount code' field at checkout. You must be logged into your account for the code to work.

You must have submitted or updated your account to reflect your birthday before the date has passed to be eligible to receive your birthday gift code. Also note, you can only submit or update your birthday once per calendar year.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.nobullproject.com/pages/exchanges-and-returns

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: We offer free returns and exchanges for orders placed on nobullproject.com and delivered within the US.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/nobull/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/JustTheHorns/

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to contact us via this link: https://support.nobullproject.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=539927 Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! Simply look for the ID.me verification at checkout as you complete your order. Click the "Verify" button and follow the steps!

templates.name: How can I check my gift card balance?
templates.content: You can check your gift cart balance at the following link: https://www.nobullproject.com/pages/check-gift-card-balance

templates.name: How do I clean my NOBULL Footwear?
templates.content: When it comes to cleaning your NOBULL shoes, the simpler the better. We recommend using warm water with a mild clear soap and then spot cleaning with a wet cloth or soft brush.  We do not recommend putting your NOBULLs in the washing machine.

templates.name: How long does it take to get a refund?
templates.content:
Typically, returns are processed within 10 business days from the time it arrives at our facility. From there, you will receive an email once we have processed your return and issued your refund.

Most refunds will be posted to your account within 3 to 5 business days, however some may take up to 10 business days depending on your financial institution.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://www.nobullproject.com/apps/returns

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content:
Happy to help! Our footwear and apparel are listed in standard US sizing and typically run true to size. If you find that you are in between sizes in footwear, we recommend going half a size up to allow some space for movement and toe mobility. Additionally, you can review the Size Guide across all the specific product page to ensure you get the right fit! 

Let me know if you're still unsure!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2-3 business days and we usually ship via UPS, USPS or DHL. Once shipped it will take 4-9 business days for domestic orders and 6-12 business days for international orders.
